title: February 23rd, 2022
body:
lyrics

i rap with the door open
y'all clap and i'm sure hoping
it don't hurt when it go through me
shoot me and you summin
wanna hear something funny
something never adds up
new me coming
known stranger onna same street you be running
you can feel the danger
every run in there's no backup and no use to you to keep fronting
shadow work is where the money's at
wanna get your hands dirty
find out whose fronting all of this and what's under that
then you serve em
take what you got, give em some of that
make it hot, bring the summer back
now it's swerving
member even sunday mostly happens outside the sermon
and it slaps til we clap back
so happy still to have that even when it's hurting
even when the hunting isn't turning nothing up
and the only thing certain
is the hunger inside, the workin
the curtain in front of our eyes
cuz the sun is too bright to see perfect
tomorrow's too far to seek purchase
and right now i'm nervous
so i rap with the door open
watch where the world's going
and let the words flow in

computer

 make computer password long and fortifying of purpose and intentions

complete log in task before using computer for anything else

set to open to computer tasks in roam

set timer for shutdown on startup. automate?

phone

 find out how to automatically close apps on timeout or something so i always open to home screen

i keep getting distracted by previous leavings
